description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6.11.3 Docker image as the default and three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_job that runs `yarn install && yarn build`, stores the resulting `build` directory as an artifact that expires in one week. In the test stage add a test_job that runs `echo "blablabla"` and also produces an artifact expiring in one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy_job that depends on build_job, uses the ruby:2.2 image, runs only on the master branch, and executes `gem install dpl` followed by `dpl --provider=heroku --app=saycle-web-live --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY` to deploy to Heroku.
